input:
Batch Number: INT-88A4
Notes: Looked over the latest tray of microprocessors. Most of them are totally fine. However, I noticed that about 3 of the units (serial numbers ending in 401, 402, and 403) had slightly bent pins on the bottom right corner. The rest of the tray (47 units) is good to go into inventory.

results.inspector_notes_summary: Slightly bent pins on bottom right corner.
